ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 Confirmation
ham.body:
Hello Jane Doe,

Thank you for your purchase from Amazon. Your order has been received and is now being processed.

Order ID: 1234567890

Items:
- Kindle Paperwhite – $129.99
- Echo Dot (3rd Gen) – $49.99

Shipping Address:
Jane Doe
123 Maple Street
Springfield, IL 62704

Estimated Delivery: 3–5 business days

If you have any questions, please contact us at <URL>.

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear John Smith,

We have detected that your QuickBooks subscription invoice #QB-987654 is overdue. Immediate action is required to avoid service disruption.

Please verify your account information and make a payment within 24 hours by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you do not take action, your QuickBooks account will be suspended and any upcoming payroll processing will be halted.

Thank you,

QuickBooks Support Team
Support@quickbooks.com
